description: Style Note Keep your essentials together stylishly in this multi-function wallet from baggit. This light weight and slim, simply designed wallet and an imprinted brand mark reveals dual sided flap with snap button closure. It has multiple pockets inside which makes it spacious. Grab it and add a bit to your daily style. Product Details Bronze coloured two fold wallet with press button flap closure   Criss cross straps with buckles on the front Six card holders and two insert pockets on the first fold Six card holders on the centre Branding on the back and one exterior zip pocket    Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust      Size Height: 9 cm Width: 19 cm Depth: 1 cm
